lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the vehicle has been maintained to the highest standard.
This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear and small cosmetic blemishes. All major mechanical and electrical systems are functional.

Looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next owner? This car is a fantastic choice for anyone needing a functional daily driver! It shows some honest signs of use and minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age, but it remains a solid, dependable vehicle that’s ready to get you where you need to go. A great value for a practical car!

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, truly a collector-grade example. The paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine, and there are no chips, scratches, or imperfections to be found anywhere on the exterior. Inside, the leather remains supple and smells like new, with zero wear on the bolsters or controls. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory, supported by a complete, documented service history. It has been garage-kept under a cover and has never seen rain or inclement weather. This is a rare opportunity to own a perfectly preserved specimen that looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches on the passenger side and a minor dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is functional but the upholstery shows significant wear, particularly on the driver's seat. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, but it will soon require routine maintenance, including a brake pad replacement and a fresh set of tires. It's a solid, honest car for someone willing to put in a little work to bring it back to its best.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and exhibiting no discernible wear, this unit represents the pinnacle of its class. The exterior retains a flawless luster, while the interior remains in pristine, original state. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new, this acquisition offers an unparalleled standard of excellence.

Hey there! 👋 I'm so excited to share this absolute gem with you. If you're looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor, this is it! It’s been pampered its whole life, kept tucked away in a garage, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you'd think it was brand new. Not a single blemish to be found—just pure, polished perfection. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with you. Feel free to reach out with any questions; I’d love to see this beauty go to a great home!

This concours-grade 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera S represents the pinnacle of the 997.1 generation, featuring a mid-mounted 3.8L naturally aspirated flat-six engine with integrated dry-sump lubrication. The M97.01 power plant is mated to a precise 6-speed G97 manual transaxle, delivering power through a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Technical highlights include Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) for variable damping and four-piston aluminum monoblock calipers over cross-drilled vented rotors for exceptional thermal
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service history included.

Presenting an absolute gem: a collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, shielded from the elements and preserved in breathtaking condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine leather and untouched trim, completely free of wear, odors, or blemishes. Mechanically, it is flawless; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive log of records included. With exceptionally low mileage and a smooth, powerful performance, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. It comes complete with all original keys, manuals, and a clean title. For the buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This specimen exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity consistent with showroom delivery, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a standard of care that ensures its status as a premier example of the marque, offering an uncompromising driving experience for those who demand excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and an uncompromising maintenance history. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paintwork, adheres to the highest standards of automotive excellence. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a vehicle that defies its age through absolute mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

Hey everyone! Up for grabs is my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is!
Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours-ready condition. Powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

Presenting an absolute gem: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that is entirely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections, complemented by flawless alloy wheels wrapped in premium, high-tread tires. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple with no signs of wear or creasing, and the original 'new car' scent still lingers. Every electronic feature, from the high-resolution infotainment system to the climate-controlled seating, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a full dealership service history and a whisper-quiet engine that delivers smooth, effortless power. It has been meticulously garaged and pampered by a single owner, coming complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a comprehensive maintenance log. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of peerless caliber, maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle resides in pristine condition, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic paired with uncompromising mechanical integrity. Every facet of this machine reflects a legacy of fastidious care, making it an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of excellence. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defines the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine asset.

Hey everyone! You have to see this absolute beauty. It’s in mint condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been my pride and joy, kept safely in the garage and pampered every single day. No scratches, no dents—just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

An exceptional example of the E46 M3, this vehicle features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis has received comprehensive preventative maintenance, including documented rear subframe reinforcement and a proactive rod bearing replacement. The suspension geometry is maintained via Bilstein dampers and high-durometer bushings, ensuring the legendary handling characteristics remain intact. Every mechanical system, from the high-pressure VANOS lines to the cooling system, is in peak operational state. This collector-grade specimen exhibits zero deferred maintenance and presents in showroom condition.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Full service history. Garage kept. No mechanical issues.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that defies its age. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a deep, mirror-like exterior finish completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state; the premium leather bolsters show no signs of entry wear, the dashboard is crack-free, and it retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the intricate climate controls, operates with tactile precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, serialized service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. It drives as if it just left the assembly line—tight, responsive, and exceptionally smooth. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that satisfies even the most discerning inspection. All original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover are included.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional pedigree, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite you to acquire this benchmark of automotive excellence.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom state. Every aspect of this motorcar, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising preservation. This is an investment-grade example intended for the most discerning collector who demands excellence in both aesthetics and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total stunner! This car has been pampered since day one and looks like it literally just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s in truly pristine shape, inside and out—no scratches, no spills, just pure driving bliss. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, you’ve found it! Come say hi and take a look for yourself!
